prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='CWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='ETS', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals high model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.7681) and significant seasonality variance (0.7355), indicating models capture patterns very differently. ETS dominates as overall champion with best RMSE (566.52) while CWT_catboost leads trend tracking. The true series shows mixed trends across folds (down, down, up). Given high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths without over-relying on any single approach.

Given high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths without over-relying on any single approach."

raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3", "inverse_rmse_weights_k5_sh0.35"],
  "params_overrides": {},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=9 indicates high model diversity favoring per-horizon selection methods. RMSE spread_ratio=0.7681 suggests top-k approaches over full mean. Pattern analyst explicitly recommends dba_combination for handling phase shifts and seasonality variance (seasonality_corr_variance=0.7355). Selected 4 candidates: DBA for robustness, best_per_horizon for selection diversity, topk_k3 for stability with few windows, and inverse_rmse_weights_k5_sh0.35 for weighted averaging with shrinkage."
}

ETS dominates as overall champion with best RMSE (566.52) while CWT_catboost leads trend tracking. The true series shows mixed trends across folds (down, down, up). Given high disagreement and seasonality variance, DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model strengths without over-relying on any single approach.
